summary: Iteration 4 (catalog expansion + reseller v2 API + API keys + favorites + refills + cancels + bulk CSV + announcements + profit dashboard + CSV export) tested end-to-end. 17/18 new backend tests pass, 45/45 iteration-3 regression tests pass, all new frontend pages (Profile/Favorites/Refills/BulkUpload + admin Profit/Refills/Announcements) load correctly and nav is preserved. Two bugs found — one fixed (OrdersList missing lucide imports crashed Orders page into a blank screen; fixed), one left for main agent (CSV export endpoint /api/orders/export is shadowed by orders_router's /{order_id} GET route; returns 404).

critical.issue: Returns 404 'Order not found' because orders_router is registered BEFORE extras_router, and orders_router's GET /{order_id} catches the literal 'export' as an order_id lookup. Frontend Export CSV button therefore fails too.

integration_issues.issue: Button now renders (after my import fix) but click hits the broken /api/orders/export (returns 404). Backend route order must be fixed.

action_items: Fix /api/orders/export routing: include extras_router BEFORE orders_router in /app/backend/server.py (swap order of include_router calls), OR add the export route inside orders_router itself before the /{order_id} catch-all, OR rename the path to /api/orders-export. This single change unblocks both the backend test and the frontend Export CSV button.
critical_code_review_comments: HIGH: FastAPI route-ordering bug: orders_router.get('/{order_id}') shadows extras_router.get('/orders/export'). General lesson — put static string routes (or include extras_router) BEFORE path-param catch-all routes.

HIGH (fixed): /app/frontend/src/pages/OrdersList.jsx used <Download />, <RotateCcw />, <XCircle /> at line 86+ but only imported {RefreshCw, Search} from lucide-react → ReferenceError crashed the entire Orders page to a blank screen. I added the missing imports.
api_v2_router._resolve_api_key calls request.form() and request.json() sequentially in a fallback; works but both consume the body — Starlette caches so it is fine today but fragile. Minor.

extras_router.cancel_order refunds via direct balance increment AND creates a payment_transactions row with provider='refund'. Good audit trail — but the refund does not also write to the notifications collection (order cancel by user is silent). Consider parity with refill status notifications.
admin_create_announcement iterates all users and inserts notifications one-by-one. For 5000+ users this should be bulk insert (insert_many) — not blocking now but a perf smell.
admin_update_refill happily accepts 'completed' but never actually credits or places a supplier re-order — purely notional status. Document as expected or wire to supplier.
orders/bulk returns HTTP 200 even when the CSV has some invalid rows among valid ones — this is correct per spec (mixed results). Spec-compliant, flagging only for awareness.

Profit dashboard aggregates orders.status indiscriminately (includes Canceled orders in revenue/cost). If business considers Canceled as non-revenue, filter {'status': {'$ne': 'Canceled'}} in the pipeline.
OrdersList.jsx still missing data-testid on the per-row Refill/Cancel action buttons — add data-testid='orders-refill-{order_id}' / 'orders-cancel-{order_id}' for automation.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/OrdersList.jsx (added missing lucide imports: Download, RotateCcw, XCircle — was crashing Orders page)
seed_data_creation: Top-up of +$50 applied to demo user at module start. Tests created: 2 bulk orders, 1 refill (marked completed), 1 cancel+refund order, 1 v2-API order, 1 announcement (deleted at end), 2 API keys (deleted at end). Demo balance drifted during tests but stays positive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes router ordering, re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4.py::TestCsvExport -v. Also re-verify Export CSV button downloads a .csv from the Orders UI. Everything else iteration 4 related has been validated: v2 reseller API + API key CRUD (create/revoke/delete all work), favorites dedupe, refill/cancel flows with admin status transitions and notifications, bulk CSV pre-validation + atomic deduct, announcements broadcast to user notifications, profit aggregation. Electron scaffold exists at /app/electron (not runtime-tested per scope). Existing iteration 1–3 regression: all 45 tests still pass — nothing regressed.
rca of the issue: Export CSV 404 RCA: in /app/backend/server.py, orders_router (which defines GET /api/orders/{order_id}) is included at line 46, extras_router (which defines GET /api/orders/export) at line 56. FastAPI resolves routes in registration order — the /{order_id} param route matches 'export' first, the handler calls db.orders.find_one({'order_id':'export', ...}) → None → raises HTTPException(404 'Order not found'). Reproduction: curl -b cookie 'https://.../api/orders/export' → 404 with detail 'Order not found'. Fix: swap include order (app.include_router(extras_router) BEFORE app.include_router(orders_router)) OR move the export route into orders_router above the /{order_id} handler. OrdersList blank-page RCA: lucide-react is a tree-shaken icon library — using an undeclared identifier raises ReferenceError on render, crashing the component subtree. Added the three missing imports; Orders page renders fully now.
